metadata.name: Guest Requests Room Service Tray Pickup

description: A guest calls to have their used room service tray removed from their room.

nodes.task_description: Thank the guest and confirm their room number.

expected_outcome.expected: The agent gets the correct room number.

nodes.task_description: Create a task in the system for a room service attendant to retrieve the tray.

expected_outcome.expected: A new task is created and dispatched.

nodes.task_description: Inform the guest that someone will be there shortly.

expected_outcome.expected: The agent sets a clear expectation with the guest.
